title: pelargonium luteolum
intro: Pelargonium luteolum, also known as the yellow-leaved geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pelargonium, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium luteolum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Pelargonium luteolum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
